Home / About RBR / Career Opportunities
Join our crew at RBR

At RBR, we know that great people make great things happen. Our success is powered by the skilled, dedicated team we’ve built, and our high-performing, supportive culture.

Why work here?

We’re not just making instruments – we’re enabling discovery. As a global leader in oceanographic technology, we meet the challenges of researchers around the world in developing high-quality, reliable tools that help us better understand our oceans. Our focus on research and development keeps us pushing boundaries and at the forefront of ocean science.

Ready to make waves with us? Dive into our open positions and be part of our mission to measure the blue planet!

Current perks at RBR

At RBR, we provide a variety of perks designed to help our team thrive. Whether you’re collaborating in the office or enjoying some well-deserved time off to recharge, we offer benefits that support you at work and beyond.

Here’s a deeper dive into some of our current perks:

20 vacation days, paid sick days, and a year-end holiday shutdown
Dog-friendly office – recently reintroduced
Day-one health and dental benefits and RRSP matching
Bonus program
